violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Observed hashbrowns and patties in cooler and freezer not being protected from potential contamination.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Observed eggs on top shelf in the reach in cooler. Under the eggs were tortilla shells. This was corrected on site.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. Observed 0 ppm in the 3 comp sink in the kitchen at time of inspection.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. No Chlorine test strips at time of inspection

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Observed cups being on stored on the floor at time of inspection.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Observed pans being stored in the hand sink in the kitchen at time of inspection.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Observed the floor where the chest freezer is located was not smooth or easily cleanable.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed plastic chute in ice maker needs to be cleaned.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food in microwave.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floors, walls and ceiling need to be cleaned in food prep area.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
